general_facts: fire hot
mammoth big
stock reconciliation backbone of logistics
morning load moves items to VAN via bulk api
evening audit checks physical vs system count for specific VAN server-side
inventory uses generic (item_id, catalog_id) schema
product_types entity deprecated; unified under item_catalog (Hardware Types)
booking system uses hardware quantity counters with dynamic travel/duration calculation
maps modernized with CartoDB Voyager tiles and Leaflet Control Geocoder for global search
mobile field operations added with camera-based barcode scanning (html5-qrcode) for job completion and stock audit
AppointmentDetailView refactored into a hybrid interface with responsive drag-and-drop and integrated barcode scanning
Automation Rules Engine enhanced with real-time JSON validation and auto-pretty-printing for webhooks
Live Postman-style JSON syntax highlighting integrated into the Automation Rules Engine using Prism.js and layered ghosting CSS
JSON editor alignment shift resolved with strict box-model synchronization and scroll-coupled ghosting layers
Technician vacation management integrated with date-range picker and collision-aware scheduling logic in Appointments View
Appointments module expanded with multi-parameter filter bars and a dedicated rescheduling workflow with action logging
Appointment Detail View enhanced with technician name resolution, calculated time windows, optimized map visibility (450px), and unified status badge styling
Appointments View refactored to modularize booking modal, enabling unified validation for both creation and rescheduling

Appointments Gantt View redesigned into a high-density, split-pane interface inspired by enterprise solutions (Salesforce FSL), featuring hourly markers, technician utilization stats, and location-based grouping
Appointments table now displays human-readable technician names via a pre-fetched userMap, with filters supporting name-based searching
Vans management UI restricted to 1:1 technician assignment using single-select dropdowns, while maintaining list-based backend compatibility
Appointment booking modal enhanced with dynamic coverage status explicitly showing both Van ID and assigned technician name

Stock.A: compare physical CSV to system items in VAN
